total_budget_authority of $383,268,177 reflects only specifically quantified new appropriations in anomaly sections; excludes the core CR baseline (SEC. 101) which provides all discretionary spending at FY2024 rates
SEC. 145 provides indefinite appropriation ('such sums as may be necessary') for TANF activities — not included in total
SEC. 149 rescinds and reappropriates an indeterminate amount (remaining unobligated VA construction balances) — net $0 not reflected in totals
SEC. 131 contains two CR substitutions: one reduces OPM main appropriation by $28,292,000, the other increases a proviso amount by $52,292,000
SEC. 126, 139, 142, and 144 provide amounts 'at a rate for operations' — the stated dollar figures are annualized rates, not lump-sum appropriations
SEC. 136 ($231M for Secret Service) is conditioned on transmission of the Mission Assurance Report regarding the attempted assassination of Donald J. Trump
All provisions in Division B Title I are authority extensions or policy amendments without explicit dollar amounts
Most provisions extend existing authorities through December 20, 2024, aligning with the CR expiration date
SEC. 105 is the most complex provision, combining policy amendments, a date extension, and a new GAO report requirement
SEC. 110 contains complex structural amendments to the Compact of Free Association Amendments Act of 2024 regarding Palau
SEC. 222 sets Medicare Improvement Fund at $3,197,000,000 for FY2026, replacing prior $0 for FY2022; commonly used as a budget offset mechanism
SEC. 211 provides $27,100,000 in additional Medicaid allotment for Northern Mariana Islands for FY2023-2024 period, payable even if disbursed in FY2025
All provisions in Title II are amendments to authorizing statutes (mandatory spending extensions), not discretionary appropriations
SEC. 313 adds new authority (flat grave markers at Santa Fe National Cemetery) rather than extending an existing sunset—classified as rider
SEC. 325(b) is a technical redesignation amendment with no substantive policy change—classified as other
SEC. 334 authorizes $2,500,000 per year for FY2024-2027 for Paralympic/Olympic sports program and makes organizational changes (VBA to VHA transfer)
SEC. 336 extends VA housing loan fee sunset by 14 days (Nov 15 to Nov 29, 2031) as a budgetary offset—classified as other
SEC. 338 replaces the FY2022-2025 period with FY2026-2029 rather than simply extending the end date
